name: Rudra Kumar Sinha
title: Optometry Intern at CL Gupta Eye Institute | B.Optometry Student

experience.title: Intern Optometrist
experience.description: Performing comprehensive eye examinations, refraction, tonometry, and patient counseling at a leading eye care institution.

description: I'm Rudra Kumar Sinha, a dedicated and enthusiastic optometry intern at CL Gupta Eye Institute, currently pursuing a Bachelor of Optometry at Chandigarh University. My core interests lie in contact lenses, ocular diseases, and vision science innovation.
bio: I'm Rudra Kumar Sinha, a dedicated and enthusiastic optometry intern at CL Gupta Eye Institute, currently pursuing a Bachelor of Optometry at Chandigarh University. My core interests lie in contact lenses, ocular diseases, and vision science innovation. With a strong academic foundation and hands-on clinical exposure, I've conducted research on AI-based digital handheld ophthalmoscopes exploring how technology can revolutionize eye care in underserved regions.
